message:
Improve daemon package test coverage (57% -> 63.5%)

- Add tests for getTokenExpiry with all providers and error cases
- Add tests for recordError in backup scheduler
- Add tests for CreateBackup disabled/not-due cases
- Add tests for LoadState with no file and invalid JSON
- Add tests for RotateBackups with default KeepLast
- Add tests for WritePIDFile with stale files
- Add tests for checkAndBackup and checkAndRefresh verbose mode
- Add tests for getProfileHealth with codex/gemini profiles
- Fix health/storage.go: correct function names LockFile/UnlockFile

Coverage improvements:
- recordError: 0% -> 75%
- getTokenExpiry: 0% -> 77%
- WritePIDFile: 0% -> 54%
- LoadState: 56% -> 67%
- RotateBackups: 73% -> 81%
- ListBackups: 75% -> 85%
- ReloadConfig: 56% -> 71%

Part of caam-cbm9: Unit tests for daemon package

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
